scripts.dev: npx tsc src/game/gameState.ts --outDir src/game/dist --module commonjs --target es2022 --moduleResolution node --noEmit false --esModuleInterop --ignoreConfig --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 && concurrently "node server.cjs" "vite"
scripts.build: npx tsc src/game/gameState.ts --outDir src/game/dist --module commonjs --target es2022 --moduleResolution node --noEmit false --esModuleInterop --ignoreConfig --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 && vite build
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.package:apk: export ANDROID_HOME=/home/gemini/android-sdk && export JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64 && export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools && npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && mkdir -p ../out && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ../out/alchemists-crucible.apk
scripts.ios:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
